title: Create Plus Modpack
description:
这是一个以机械动力为主的轻量级整合包，适用于1.20.1Forge和Fabric。
This is a lightweight modpack focusing on mechanical power, suitable for minecraft version 1.20.1 of Forge and Fabric.
body:
# Create Plus Modpack
# ZH
## 简介
这是一个以机械动力为主的轻量级整合包，适用于1.20.1Forge和Fabric。
偶尔会更新
## 计划支持
|      |**forge**|**fabric**|**neoforge**|
| ---- | ---- | ---- | ---- |
|**1.21**|<font color = blue>待机械动力支持1.21forge后将会支持</font>|<font color = blue>待机械动力支持1.21fabric后将会支持</font>|<font color = blue>待机械动力支持1.21neoforge后将会支持</font>|
|**1.20.2~1.20.6**|<font color = red>因机械动力无计划支持1.20.2~1.20.6所以不支持</font>|<font color = red>因机械动力无计划支持1.20.2~1.20.6所以不支持</font>|<font color = red>因机械动力无计划支持1.20.2~1.20.6所以不支持</font>|
|**1.20.1**|<font color = green>完全支持</font>|<font color = green>完全支持</font>|<font color = green>完全支持</font>|
|**1.19.3&4**|<font color = red>因机械动力无计划支持1.19.3&4所以不支持</font>|<font color = red>因机械动力无计划支持1.19.3&4所以不支持</font>|      |
|**1.19.2**|<font color = blue>未来可能支持</font>|<font color = blue>未来可能支持</font>|      |
|**1.18.2及以下**|<font color = red>无支持计划</font>|<font color = red>无支持计划</font>|      |
## 帮助
### 怎么安装？
整合包后缀为mrpack格式，直接将文件导入到启动器就行。
### 许可证
许可证未来可能为MIT，目前暂无许可证。
## 特点
- 修改了默认设置，将渲染距离和模拟距离改为6。
- 关掉了垂直同步，并将帧率最大值拉到无限制。
- 将[Xaero's Minimap](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-minimap)的地图位置放到了右上角，避免与帧率叠加。
- 左上角显示帧率和坐标。
- 按C键可以放大（有动画），鼠标滚轮来设置放大倍率。
- 等其他的设置（自己看）...
## 优化效果
实测，作者的i5-6200渣机平均100FPS+。
## 注
github上的备用下载源只包含1.1.0及以上版本。
## 整合包版本
<details>
<summary>1.x.x</summary>
  
  ## 1.0.0
  一切的开端。
  
</details>

# EN
## Introduction
This is a lightweight modpack mainly based on mechanical power, suitable for 1.20.1 Forge and Fabric.
It will be updated occasionally.

## Planned Support
|      |**forge**|**fabric**|**neoforge**|
| ---- | ---- | ---- | ---- |
|**1.21**|<font color=blue>Will be supported after create supports 1.21 forge</font>|<font color=blue>Will be supported after create supports 1.21 fabric</font>|<font color=blue>Will be supported after create supports 1.21 fabric</font>|
|**1.20.2~1.20.6**|<font color=red>Not supported due to no plans for create to support 1.20.2~1.20.6</font>|<font color=red>Not supported due to no plans for create to support 1.20.2~1.20.6</font>|<font color=red>Not supported due to no plans for create to support 1.20.2~1.20.6</font>|
|**1.20.1**|<font color=green>Fully supported</font>|<font color=green>Fully supported</font>|<font color=green>Fully supported</font>|
|**1.19.3&4**|<font color=red>Not supported due to no plans for create to support 1.19.3&4</font>|<font color=red>Not supported due to no plans for create to support 1.19.3&4</font>|      |
|**1.19.2**|<font color=blue>May be supported in the future</font>|<font color=blue>May be supported in the future</font>|      |
|**1.18.2 and below**|<font color=red>No plans to support</font>|<font color=red>No plans to support</font>|      |

## Help
### How to install?
The modpack is in mrpack format, just import the file into the launcher.

### License
The license may be MIT in the future, currently there is no license.

## Features
- Modified default settings, changed render distance and simulation distance to 6.
- Turned off vertical sync and set the maximum frame rate to unlimited.
- Placed the map position of Xaero's Minimap in the upper right corner to avoid overlapping with the frame rate.
- Display frame rate and coordinates in the upper left corner.
- Press the C key to zoom in (with animation), use the mouse wheel to set the zoom level.
- Other settings (check them yourself)...

## Optimization Effect
Tested, the author's i5-6200 low-end machine averages 100FPS+.

##Note:
The backup download sources on GitHub only include versions 1.1.0 and above.

## Modpack Version

<details>
<summary>1.x.x</summary>
  
  ## 1.0.0
  The beginning of everything.

</details>
